title: UltimaCraft Models
description: Custom blocks, items and entities models (3D models)
body:
![UltimaCraft Models poster](https://i.ibb.co/Sf5Px9G/models-poster-1-1.jpg) # UltimaCraft Models **UltimaCraft Models** - is an add-on for [UltimaCraft resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimacraft-main) which adds custom (3D) models of blocks, entities and mobs. ## Features Vanilla: - custom block models - custom item models [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required: - custom entity models
Full feature list
  • armor stand item model
  • barrel model
  • beacon model
  • bed models
  • bee nest model
  • beehive model
  • bell item model
  • blast furnace model
  • boat item models
  • bookshelf model (with variants)
  • brewing stand model
  • cactus model
  • cake model
  • cartography table model
  • cauldron model
  • chain model
  • chest models
  • chiseled bookshelf model
  • composter model
  • copper grate model
  • crafter model
  • crafting table model
  • daylight detector model
  • decorated pot model
  • dispenser model
  • door models
  • dried kelp block model
  • dropper model
  • enchanting table model
  • end portal frame model
  • ender chest model
  • fletching table model
  • flower pot item model
  • furnace model
  • glass and stained glass models
  • glass pane and stained glass pane models
  • hanging signs models
  • hay block model
  • hopper model
  • iron bars model
  • jack o'lantern model
  • jukebox model
  • ladder model
  • lantern and soul lantern models
  • lantern model
  • lectern model
  • loom model
  • minecarts models
  • observer model
  • ores models
  • piston model
  • pointed dripstone model
  • pumpkin model
  • rails models
  • respawn anchor
  • shrieker model
  • shulkers models
  • slabs models
  • small dripleaf model
  • smithing table model
  • smoker model
  • spawner model
  • stonecutter model
  • trapdoor models
  • trial spawner model
  • vault model
  • walls models
  • wheat crop model
